TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tingalaw, title = Tingalaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tingalaw} }

S.FORM: alang Tingalaw ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 150 buwan, 398 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 367 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 31 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 88%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tingalaw hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tingalaw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tingalaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tingalaw hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Tingalaw hya' ga pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tay mkraya' na Tingalaw hya' ga Malaloong. tay mkyahu' na Tingalaw hya' ga Fakong. pqwasan maki qu ngasal bziran, "Tingalaw kyokay". rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tingalaw ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tingalaw ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 150 buwan, 398 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 367 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 31 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 88%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tingalaw hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tingalaw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tingalaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tingalaw hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Tingalaw hya' ga pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tay mkraya' na Tingalaw hya' ga Malaloong. tay mkyahu' na Tingalaw hya' ga Fakong. pqwasan maki qu ngasal bziran, "Tingalaw kyokay". rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tingalaw ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč tiŇčalaw …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu tojońßama …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na tiŇčalaw ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj Ēzil na tiŇčalaw ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj mkjańßu Ē na tiŇčalaw ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na tiŇčalaw ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēllaw na tiŇčalaw ńßja Ē …£a pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. taj mkraja Ē na tiŇčalaw ńßja Ē …£a malalooŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na tiŇčalaw ńßja Ē …£a *akoŇč. pqwas~…ēan maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, "tiŇčalaw kjokaj". rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč tiŇčalaw …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
